summary.note: Audit independently verified every COR against current code, page reports, browser behavior, design, architecture, security and persistence authorities. No candidate closure claim was accepted without reproduction.

records.closureCommit: docs(governance): 闭合产品实现纠正项状态与验收证据
evidence: Removed automatic writeMoveAssessment call from src/stores/analysis.ts.
Analysis results are now displayed only in the analysis panel; explicit user action is required before writing to PGN annotations.
Static governance, typecheck, production build and browser validation pass.
records.reopenTrigger: AI automatically writes annotations on completion or runs on unauthorized sources.

records.closureCommit: feat(workspace): 完成统一工作区逐页设计实现
evidence: WorkspaceStartSurface rendered when no source is loaded.
EvalBar, analysis region and AI controls gated by WorkspacePermissionAdapter and hasBoardContent.
No default fake board rendered on entry.
records.reopenTrigger: Fake initial board or AI/evaluation controls appear without source or on live/readonly sources.

records.closureCommit: feat(workspace): 完成统一工作区逐页设计实现
evidence: WorkspacePermissionAdapter gates all write capabilities through isLocalEditable.
Toolbar, board capabilities and annotation tools respect canEditBoard/canEditAnnotations/canEnterBoardEditor.
Local import creates a new editable source instead of mutating readonly source.
records.reopenTrigger: Any write action reachable in readonly/live context or source PGN modified without explicit local copy.

records.closureCommit: n/a
evidence: VenueDisplayShell with fixed header, controls, stage and status bar implemented.
Public pairing composition renders as cards with pagination, pause/focus and truthful unavailable banner.
Single/quad/paginated multi-board modes using CanonicalChessBoard are not yet implemented.
records.remainingDependency: Implementation of 1/4/N board modes; OD-05/06 for final density constants.
records.reopenTrigger: Claim that single-board, quad-board or paginated multi-board modes are implemented.

records.closureCommit: n/a
evidence: Explicit URL round priority implemented in both detail and display.
Fallback still uses sourceCurrentRoundId with first/last round fallback; commentary and display do not yet have two distinct approved default-order policies.
Mapper discards content.roundfinish because its schema/semantics are not confirmed.
records.remainingDependency: Confirmed schema and semantics of content.roundfinish; implementation of two approved default policies.
records.reopenTrigger: Inferring round lifecycle from unconfirmed roundfinish structure or claiming two distinct policies are complete.

records.closureCommit: feat(competition): 完成赛事详情页逐页设计实现
records.affectedPage: 赛事详情、统一工作区 replay、兼容入口
evidence: Pairing action text lifecycle-gated: finished shows '回放暂不可用', ongoing shows '实时暂不可用', not-started shows no replay/live entry.
useRemoteReplayLoader rejects non-replay modes and missing gameId; fetchFinishedGameReplay stub returns service-unavailable.
No fallback PGN or fake replay handoff.
records.reopenTrigger: UI fabricates replay success, creates replay handoff for ongoing/not-started pairings, or mixes commentary/replay labels.

records.closureCommit: feat(routes): 完成兼容入口与不可用表面实现
records.affectedPage: 统一工作区、兼容入口、赛场展示、赛事详情
evidence: Endpoint allowlist contains only confirmed production endpoints.
Cloud/share/live/clock/hardware/replay success paths are absent; surfaces show truthful contract-blocked unavailable state.
No generic /CALL, dynamic proxy, mock or fallback success data.
records.remainingDependency: Real backend contracts for cloud/share import, live board/snapshot, MQTT/subscription, authoritative clock, hardware history/latest and protected replay.
records.reopenTrigger: Unapproved endpoint added, invented repository/DTO/provider/clock, or mock/fallback success data returned.

records.closureCommit: feat(routes): 完成兼容入口与不可用表面实现
evidence: Invalid/unreadable handoff renders ProductUnavailableState with mode='unknown'; no fallback to successful local workspace.
workspaceModeQuery ignores direct ?mode/?source/?readonly/?qrcode/?sn injection.
Catch-all route renders NotFoundView instead of redirecting to /.
records.reopenTrigger: Invalid handoff silently falls back to working workspace, direct query parameters override readonly/source, or unknown paths redirect to /.

records.closureCommit: feat(login): 完成登录页逐页设计实现
evidence: LoginView distinguishes validation, invalid credentials, session expired and service unavailable states.
Safe return path sanitization prevents open redirect.
match/cloud/live routes do not require auth before contract evaluation.
records.remainingDependency: Future protected replay/cloud/live API contract to enable requiresAuth route meta.
records.reopenTrigger: Login UI collapses distinct error kinds into a single alert, or unclosed entry points gain requiresAuth.

records.closureCommit: n/a
records.affectedPage: 赛事列表/详情/display、remote replay、未来 live
evidence: AbortSignal passes through tournament Query->repository->Axios.
placeholderData: keepPreviousData prevents old results overwriting current selection.
Replay stub receives signal but synchronously rejects; real cancellation cannot be verified until replay/live contract exists.
records.remainingDependency: Confirmed replay/live backend contract and real repository implementation.
records.reopenTrigger: New replay/live adapter implemented without signal forwarding, cancellation surfaced as error, or late results not discarded.

records.closureCommit: docs(governance): 闭合产品实现纠正项状态与验收证据
records.affectedPage: 登录、统一工作区分析/右面板
evidence: src/styles/tokens.css defines --fs-md, --text-inverse, --focus-ring, --workspace-focus-ring-width/offset.
--eval-advantage-line removed.

records.closureCommit: docs(governance): 闭合产品实现纠正项状态与验收证据
evidence: New tokens --card-max-w, --dialog-max-w, --drawer-w, --drawer-w-collapsed, --route-bp-narrow added to tokens.css.
Raw values in LoginView, ProductDialog, ProductDrawer, ProductRouteShell, RouteHeader, VenueDisplayShell, TeachingWorkspace, SettingsSurface replaced or synchronized.

records.closureCommit: docs(governance): 闭合产品实现纠正项状态与验收证据
records.affectedPage: 登录、统一工作区、赛事浏览、公共 overlays
evidence: LoginView sets initial focus to account input.
ProductTabs implements ArrowRight/Down/Left/Up/Home/End navigation.
WorkspaceSplitter supports keyboard resizing and Escape restore.
ProductButton adds project :focus-visible outline using --focus-ring.
ACCESSIBILITY_SPEC.md corrected: arrow keys move board squares or move-list; '?' shortcut marked disabled until owner exists.
records.reopenTrigger: New interactive control lacks project focus-visible style, or accessibility doc reverts to dual arrow-key assignment.

records.closureCommit: docs(governance): 闭合产品实现纠正项状态与验收证据
evidence: useBoardCapabilityOptions decouples interaction.keyboard from position.playable.
useBoardView allows square navigation on readonly boards but gates move submission on interactive.
Default square labels use Chinese piece names (白兵, 黑马, etc.).
records.reopenTrigger: Readonly board cannot receive Tab focus, cannot navigate squares, or square labels contain English color/type terms.

records.closureCommit: feat(ui): 建立逐页实现所需共享界面基础
records.affectedPage: 赛事列表、详情、display、兼容页；全局 shell
evidence: App.vue sets height to --workspace-viewport-h and overflow:hidden.
ProductRouteShell has fixed header, flex-1 scroll body and bounded content region.
All route views use ProductRouteShell; body scrollHeight equals clientHeight.
records.reopenTrigger: Route rendered outside ProductRouteShell or App.vue reintroduces body scroll.

records.closureCommit: feat(workspace): 完成统一工作区逐页设计实现
evidence: isNarrow breakpoint (<=900px) renders ProductDrawer for sources and ProductSheet for context.
Desktop .area-list hidden at narrow widths; board-stage remains visible.
Editor dock adapts at narrow/short viewports.
records.remainingDependency: OD-09 for full narrow-screen editing capability.
records.reopenTrigger: Tablet/narrow viewport loses source navigation, board collapses, or editor becomes unusable.

records.closureCommit: n/a
records.affectedPage: 统一工作区 PGN 导入
evidence: usePgnWorkspaceRuntime merges files and calls pgn.openText/insertText with a single merged string.
parseStrictCollection throws on any parseError, failing the entire import.
No per-file progress, cancellation, partial-success summary or structured failure reasons.
records.remainingDependency: Design and implementation of file-level progress and partial-failure summary.
records.reopenTrigger: Claim that local PGN import supports partial failure while it remains all-or-nothing.

records.closureCommit: docs(governance): 闭合产品实现纠正项状态与验收证据
records.affectedPage: 任何采用 PgnChessBoard 的页面
records.browserPath: Component not yet adopted by current pages; static/typecheck/build pass.
evidence: PgnChessBoard tracks retainedError when preserveOnInvalid is true and replacePgn fails.
ProductStateBanner rendered with title '仍显示上一次有效棋谱' and error message.
Error cleared on successful PGN change or removal.
records.reopenTrigger: PgnChessBoard adopted without visible retained-state label bound to failed source identity and recovery action.

records.closureCommit: n/a

PGN Store has drawing actions but no typed node-comment or game-note editing.
Remote sources remain read-only.

records.closureCommit: n/a
evidence: ProductConfirmDialog adapter exists with cancel-as-initial-focus, Escape/busy/return-focus policy.
Only '清除标注' action currently uses it.
No route leave guard for dirty board/annotation state; board editor cancel/finish does not prompt before discarding.

records.closureCommit: feat(competition): 完成赛事列表页逐页设计实现

Allowlists for status/type/date reject unknown values and show correction banner.
Back/forward restores form draft and query key; placeholderData keeps old results during refresh.

No fake aggregate synthesized from individual pairings.

records.closureCommit: n/a

evidence: Status bar shows last update time and retained-refresh indicator.
Partial-failure banner shown when data exists alongside an error.

evidence: Project adapters in src/ui/*.vue do not import stores/api.

PgnChessBoard maintains its own PGN runtime parallel to workspace runtime.

records.closureCommit: feat(settings): 完成全局设置表面实现
evidence: SettingsSurface is a global overlay: desktop Drawer, narrow Sheet.
Only theme (light/dark/system) and existing workspace-layout settings exposed.
No fake controls for language/sound/AI; storage-failure warning with retry.

records.closureCommit: feat(ui): 建立逐页实现所需共享界面基础
evidence: AppProviders is the single ConfigProvider/GlobalStyle owner.
naiveThemeOverrides dynamically resolves tokens from computed document style.
src/ui/*.vue adapters wrap Naive UI; architecturePolicy.naiveUiAllowlist enforced.
check:architecture-boundaries PASS.
records.reopenTrigger: Naive UI imported directly outside adapters/providers, or a second theme override owner appears.

records.closureCommit: 全部页面实现报告
records.browserPath: 全部七页窄浏览器验证
evidence: No automated test files or infrastructure (glob for *.{test,spec}.* returned empty).
All seven page reports record route-specific narrow browser validation.
Static governance, format, lint, stylelint, Knip, static, typecheck, build and audits pass.
Independent Chrome-headless DOM checks confirm non-empty DOM and no Vite error overlay on all approved routes.
records.reopenTrigger: Page slice claimed 'implemented' without route-specific narrow browser record, automated test files introduced, or governance/lint/typecheck/build allowed to fail.

commands: pnpm run audit:prod PASS (No known vulnerabilities)

browserValidationSummary.method: Chrome headless (new) DOM checks against local dev server and production build dumps.
checks: No Vite error overlay or vue-error-overlay
Contract-blocked routes render truthful unavailable surface
